name: io.github.giskard09/giskard-search
description: Web and news search for AI agents. Pay per search with Lightning or USDC on Arbitrum. No accounts.

environmentVariables.name: PHOENIXD_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of your phoenixd Lightning node

environmentVariables.name: OWNER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Arbitrum wallet private key for on-chain payment verification
